name: list_instance_templates
description: Lists Compute Engine instance templates. Details for each instance template include name, ID, description, machine type, region, and creation timestamp. Requires project as input.

parameters.description: Request message for listing instance templates basic info.

pageSize.description: Optional. The maximum number of instance templates to return.

pageToken.description: Optional. A page token received from a previous call to list instance templates.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.
